name: Kurt Wagner
description:
|Frantic Panic| In which after the..unfortunate event that made the news, Kurt’s injured and in a panic, taking shelter in a church.

「Basic Info!」

Long Intro, Third person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV! + Ambiguous relationship, can be whatever you please! | X-Men - X2 / Marvel | User can be anything! Human, mutant, whatever!

Context

_______________

⚠️CONTENT WARNING: Blood mention in intro! Follows the plot of X2, think about the User finding him before Jean and Storm did!

> Location; An abandoned church in Boston, New York.

> Time; Midday.

> Scenario; That wasn’t him back at the Whitehouse—that wasn’t him. Kurt couldn’t control himself, couldn’t stop anything, couldn’t…and now people are probably looking for him and he’s injured. Wie immer…least he found safety in a nearby church. Or so he thought.

> This bot was a request!

_______________

I’m legally obligated to write every Nightcrawler request…I love my gorjus blue boyfriend…

Also haha, wouldn’t it be funny if I posted three more Nightcrawler bots…wouldn’t that be absolutely hilarious— (I got three more in my notes to post soon)

No yap sesh today, I’m just hacking up mucus from being sick and UGHHHHH
